componentInstanceProperties.value: Change Control Request Line Item Information

criteria.rightValue: The Lead Applicant is being replaced by an existing consortium member but remaining in The consortium
The Lead Applicant is being replaced by an exisiting consortium member and leaving the consortium
The Lead Applicant is being replaced by a new consortium member but remaining in The consortium
The Lead Applicant is being replaced by a new consortium member and leaving the consortium
